The market skewness risk premium is statistically and economically significant and cannot be explained by other common risk factors such as the market excess return or the size, book-to-market, momentum, and market volatility factors, or by firm characteristics.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该论文研究了市场偏度风险对股票横截面收益的影响，使用标普500指数期权数据估计隐含偏度，发现高偏度风险暴露的股票平均收益较低，且该风险溢价不能被常见因子解释。
ai_analysis.core_factors: Market skewness risk (innovations in implied market skewness from S&P 500 index options)
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: Asset class: US stocks; Option data: S&P 500 index; Estimation frequency: daily; Rebalance frequency: not specified (likely monthly); Universe: not specified (likely all stocks)
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: No backtest data provided; only states risk premium is statistically and economically significant

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] The Time Variation in Risk Appetite and Uncertainty
excerpt_en: We formulate a dynamic no-arbitrage asset pricing model for equities and corporate bonds, featuring time variation in both risk aversion and economic uncertainty. The joint dynamics among cash flows, macroeconomic fundamentals, and risk aversion accommodate both heteroskedasticity and non-Gaussianity. The model delivers measures of risk aversion and uncertainty at the daily frequency. We verify that equity variance risk premiums are very informative about risk aversion, whereas credit spreads and corporate bond volatility are highly correlated with economic uncertainty. Our model-implied risk premiums outperform standard instruments for predicting asset excess returns. Risk aversion is substantially correlated with consumer confidence measures and in early 2020 reacted more strongly to new COVID cases than did an uncertainty proxy. This paper was accepted by Haoxiang Zhu, finance.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该论文构建了一个动态无套利资产定价模型，用于衡量风险厌恶和经济不确定性，并发现模型隐含的风险溢价能够预测资产超额收益。尽管模型有一定实用性，但实现复杂，需要估计多个参数。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 风险厌恶和不确定性指标，通过股票和公司债券数据估计的风险溢价
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：股票和公司债券；频率：日度；其他参数未明确指定
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 模型隐含的风险溢价优于标准工具预测超额收益，但未提供具体回测指标如夏普比率等。

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] How Much Do Investors Care About Macroeconomic Risk? Evidence from Scheduled Economic Announcements
excerpt_en: Abstract Stock market average returns and Sharpe ratios are significantly higher on days when important macroeconomic news about inflation, unemployment, or interest rates is scheduled for announcement. The average announcement-day excess return from 1958 to 2009 is 11.4 basis points (bp) versus 1.1 bp for all the other days, suggesting that over 60% of the cumulative annual equity risk premium is earned on announcement days. The Sharpe ratio is 10 times higher. In contrast, the risk-free rate is detectably lower on announcement days, consistent with a precautionary saving motive. Our results demonstrate a trade-off between macroeconomic risk and asset returns, and provide an estimate of the premium investors demand to bear this risk.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 论文发现股票市场在重要宏观经济消息公布日的平均收益率和夏普比率显著高于其他交易日，并指出超过60%的年权益风险溢价产生于这些公告日。提出了一种基于宏观经济日历的事件驱动交易策略。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 宏观经济公告日效应，即重要经济数据公布日的股票风险溢价
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别: 美国股票市场(如S&P 500)，回溯期: 1958-2009年，再平衡频率: 每日(仅在公告日调仓)，标的范围: 所有美国股票
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 公告日平均超额收益11.4个基点 vs 非公告日1.1个基点，夏普比率高10倍，风险溢价解释: 超过60%的年权益风险溢价来自公告日

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Investor Sentiment and Stock Market Response to Earnings News
excerpt_en: ABSTRACT We examine whether market-wide investor sentiment influences the stock price sensitivity to firm-specific earnings news. Using the recently developed measure of investor sentiment by Baker and Wurgler (2006), we find that the stock price sensitivity to good earnings news is higher during high sentiment periods than during periods of low sentiment, whereas the stock price sensitivity to bad earnings news is higher during periods of low sentiment than during periods of high sentiment. This influence of sentiment is especially pronounced for the earnings news of small stocks, young stocks, high volatility stocks, non-dividend-paying stocks, and stocks with extremely high and low market-to-book ratios. Further analysis suggests that the sentiment-driven mispricing of earnings contributes to the general mispricing of stocks due to investor sentiment. JEL Classifications: D14; D21; G24.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 研究市场情绪如何影响股票对盈利新闻的价格敏感性，发现好消息在高情绪期间敏感性更高，坏消息在低情绪期间敏感性更高，尤其在小型、年轻、高波动股票中明显。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 投资者情绪 (Baker-Wurgler指数) 与盈利新闻的交互作用
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：美国股票；情绪周期：基于Baker-Wurgler月度情绪指数；事件：盈利公告；分组：按市值、年龄、波动率、股利、账面市值比
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 无回测数据提供

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] The Same Bond at Different Prices: Identifying Search Frictions and Selling Pressures
excerpt_en: I propose a new measure that identifies when the market price of an over-the-counter traded asset is below its fundamental value due to selling pressure. The measure is the difference between prices paid by small traders and those paid by large traders. In a model for over-the-counter trading with search frictions and periods with selling pressures, I show that this measure identifies liquidity crises (i.e., high number of forced sellers). Using a structural estimation, the model is able to identify liquidity crises in the U.S. corporate bond market based on the relative prices paid by small and large traders. New light is shed on two crises, the downgrade of General Motors and Ford in 2005 and the subprime crisis The Author 2011. Published by Oxford University Press on behalf of The Society for Financial Studies. All rights reserved. For Permissions, please e-mail: journals.permissions@oup.com., Oxford University Press.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文提出通过比较小型和大型交易者的债券价格差异来识别OTC市场中的卖出压力，从而找出流动性危机。该指标可用于识别公司债市场的被迫卖出情况，但未提供具体的交易策略或回测。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 价格差异（小型与大型交易者支付的债券价格差）
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：美国公司债券；数据：OTC交易价格；未指定回测周期或再平衡频率
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 未提供回测数据

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Hedging Climate Risk
excerpt_en: We present a simple dynamic investment strategy that allows long-term passive investors to hedge climate risk without sacrificing financial returns. We illustrate how the tracking error can be virtually eliminated even for a low-carbon index with 50% less carbon footprint than its benchmark. By investing in such a decarbonized index, investors in effect are holding a “free option on carbon.” As long as climate change mitigation actions are pending, the low-carbon index obtains the same return as the benchmark index; but once carbon dioxide emissions are priced, or expected to be priced, the low-carbon index should start to outperform the benchmark.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该策略提出通过投资低碳指数来对冲气候风险，声称可以在不牺牲财务回报的情况下实现与基准指数相同的收益，并且在碳定价实施后有望超越基准。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 低碳指数、碳足迹减少、动态投资策略、基准比较
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：股票（如参考S&P 500等权益指数）；回看期和再平衡频率未指定；投资组合：低碳指数与基准指数对比。
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 跟踪误差几乎可以消除，碳足迹减少50%，在碳定价未实施时获得与基准指数相同的回报，实施后应开始超越。未提供具体的收益、夏普比率或最大回撤数据。

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Information in (and not in) the Term Structure
excerpt_en: Standard approaches to building and estimating dynamic term structure models rely on the assumption that yields can serve as the factors. However, the assumption is neither theoretically necessary nor empirically supported. This article documents that almost half of the variation in bond risk premia cannot be detected using the cross-section of yields. Fluctuations in this hidden component have strong forecast power for both future short-term interest rates and excess bond returns. They are also negatively correlated with aggregate economic activity, but macroeconomic variables explain only a small fraction of variation in the hidden factor. The Author 2011. Published by Oxford University Press on behalf of The Society for Financial Studies. All rights reserved. For Permissions, please e-mail: journals.permissions@oup.com., Oxford University Press.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文发现债券风险溢价的近一半变异无法从收益率截面中检测到，隐藏成分对未来短期利率和超额债券收益具有强预测能力，并与经济活动负相关。该研究为基于期限结构的债券交易策略提供了新视角。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 隐藏的期限结构因子（非收益率因子）
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 债券市场（国债），具体回溯期、再平衡频率和投资范围未指定
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 未提供具体的回测数据

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Algorithmic Trading and the Market for Liquidity
excerpt_en: Abstract We examine the role of algorithmic traders (ATs) in liquidity supply and demand in the 30 Deutscher Aktien Index stocks on the Deutsche Boerse in Jan. 2008. ATs represent 52% of market order volume and 64% of nonmarketable limit order volume. ATs more actively monitor market liquidity than human traders. ATs consume liquidity when it is cheap (i.e., when the bid-ask quotes are narrow) and supply liquidity when it is expensive. When spreads are narrow ATs are less likely to submit new orders, less likely to cancel their orders, and more likely to initiate trades. ATs react more quickly to events and even more so when spreads are wide.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该论文研究了2008年1月德意志交易所30只DAX股票中算法交易者（ATs）在流动性供应与需求中的作用。ATs占市场订单量的52%，非市价限价订单量的64%，并且比人类交易者更积极地监控市场流动性。他们在价差窄时消耗流动性，价差宽时提供流动性，且对事件反应更快。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 算法交易者的流动性监控与订单行为模式（价差宽度、订单提交/取消/交易发起）
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：股票；市场：德意志交易所DAX30；时间：2008年1月；
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: No backtest data provided

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Bond Risk Premiums with Machine Learning
excerpt_en: Abstract We show that machine learning methods, in particular, extreme trees and neural networks (NNs), provide strong statistical evidence in favor of bond return predictability. NN forecasts based on macroeconomic and yield information translate into economic gains that are larger than those obtained using yields alone. Interestingly, the nature of unspanned factors changes along the yield curve: stock- and labor-market-related variables are more relevant for short-term maturities, whereas output and income variables matter more for longer maturities. Finally, NN forecasts correlate with proxies for time-varying risk aversion and uncertainty, lending support to models featuring both channels.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该论文使用机器学习方法（极端树和神经网络）预测债券风险溢价，发现这些方法能提供显著的统计和经济效益。研究表明，宏观经济和收益率信息结合能提升预测能力，且不同期限债券受不同因素影响。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 基于宏观经济和收益率信息的机器学习预测（神经网络、极端树）用于债券回报可预测性
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：政府债券；回看周期：未指定；再平衡频率：未指定；投资范围：未指定
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 预测的经济收益优于仅使用收益率；预测与风险厌恶和不确定性代理变量相关。未提供具体回报率或夏普比率。

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Deep Learning in Asset Pricing
excerpt_en: We use deep neural networks to estimate an asset pricing model for individual stock returns that takes advantage of the vast amount of conditioning information, keeps a fully flexible form, and accounts for time variation. The key innovations are to use the fundamental no-arbitrage condition as criterion function to construct the most informative test assets with an adversarial approach and to extract the states of the economy from many macroeconomic time series. Our asset pricing model outperforms out-of-sample all benchmark approaches in terms of Sharpe ratio, explained variation, and pricing errors and identifies the key factors that drive asset prices. This paper was accepted by Agostino Capponi, finance. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.4695 .

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文提出使用深度神经网络估计资产定价模型，通过无套利条件和对抗方法构建测试资产，并提取宏观经济状态。该模型在夏普比率、解释方差和定价误差方面优于所有基准方法。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 深度神经网络基于无套利条件、对抗方法、宏观经济时间序列
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: Not specified
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 夏普比率、解释方差、定价误差优于基准

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] The Microstructure of the “Flash Crash”: Flow Toxicity, Liquidity Crashes, and the Probability of Informed Trading
excerpt_en: The “flash crash” of May 6, 2010, was the second-largest point swing (1,010.14 points) and the biggest one-day point decline (998.5 points) in the history of the Dow Jones Industrial Average. For a few minutes, $1 trillion in market value vanished. In this article, the authors argue that the flash crash was the result of the new dynamics at play in the current market structure. They highlight the role played by order toxicity in affecting liquidity provision, and they show that a measure of this toxicity, the volume synchronized probability of informed trading (VPIN), captures the increasing toxicity of the order flow in the hours and days prior to collapse. Because the flash crash might have been avoided had liquidity providers remained in the marketplace, a solution is proposed in the form of a “VPIN contract” that would allow liquidity providers to dynamically monitor and manage their risks. <bold>TOPICS:</bold> <ext-link>Financial crises and financial market history</ext-link>, <ext-link>exchanges/markets/clearinghouses</ext-link>, <ext-link>in markets</ext-link>

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文分析了2010年闪电崩盘，认为订单流毒性是导致流动性崩溃的关键因素，并引入成交量同步知情交易概率（VPIN）来度量毒性。作者提出了一种VPIN合约，帮助流动性提供者动态监控和管理风险，从而避免类似事件。
ai_analysis.core_factors: VPIN (成交量同步知情交易概率) 度量订单流毒性
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: Not specified
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: No backtest data provided

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Dynamic Equicorrelation
excerpt_en: A new covariance matrix estimator is proposed under the assumption that at every time period all pairwise correlations are equal. This assumption, which is pragmatically applied in various areas of finance, makes it possible to estimate arbitrarily large covariance matrices with ease. The model, called DECO, involves first adjusting for individual volatilities and then estimating correlations. A quasi-maximum likelihood result shows that DECO provides consistent parameter estimates even when the equicorrelation assumption is violated. We demonstrate how to generalize DECO to block equicorrelation structures. DECO estimates for U.S. stock return data show that (block) equicorrelated models can provide a better fit of the data than DCC. Using out-of-sample forecasts, DECO and Block DECO are shown to improve portfolio selection compared to an unrestricted dynamic correlation structure.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 提出了一种新的协方差矩阵估计方法DECO，假设所有配对相关性相等，可用于大规模协方差矩阵估计。该方法通过准最大似然估计保持一致，并在美国股票数据上表现出优于DCC的样本外投资组合选择效果。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 动态等相关系数估计（DECO）用于协方差矩阵估计，改进投资组合选择。
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: Asset class: U.S. stocks; estimation method: quasi-maximum likelihood; lookback period: not specified; rebalance frequency: not specified.
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: No backtest data provided

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Regime Changes and Financial Markets
excerpt_en: Regime-switching models can match the tendency of financial markets to often change their behavior abruptly and the phenomenon that the new behavior of financial variables often persists for several periods after such a change. Although the regimes captured by regime-switching models are identified by an econometric procedure, they often correspond to different periods in regulation, policy, and other secular changes. In empirical estimates, the means, volatilities, autocorrelations, and cross-covariances of asset returns often differ across regimes in a manner that allows regime-switching models to capture the stylized behavior of many financial series including fat tails, heteroskedasticity, skewness, and time-varying correlations. In equilibrium models, regimes in fundamental processes, such as consumption or dividend growth, strongly affect the dynamic properties of equilibrium asset prices and can induce nonlinear risk-return trade-offs. Regime switches also lead to potentially large consequences for investors' optimal portfolio choice.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该论文研究了马尔可夫区制转换模型在金融市场中的应用，发现不同区制下资产收益的均值、波动率和相关性存在差异，能够捕捉金融序列的厚尾、异方差等特征，并影响投资者的最优资产配置。但未提出具体的交易策略或回测结果。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 区制转换模型（如马尔可夫转换）识别的市场状态信号
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: Not specified
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: No backtest data provided

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Diagnostic Expectations and Stock Returns
excerpt_en: ABSTRACT We revisit La Porta's finding that returns on stocks with the most optimistic analyst long‐term earnings growth forecasts are lower than those on stocks with the most pessimistic forecasts. We document the joint dynamics of fundamentals, expectations, and returns of these portfolios, and explain the facts using a model of belief formation based on the representativeness heuristic. Analysts forecast fundamentals from observed earnings growth, but overreact to news by exaggerating the probability of states that have become more likely. We find support for the model's predictions. A quantitative estimation of the model accounts for the key patterns in the data.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该论文研究了分析师盈利预测的偏差如何影响股票收益：最乐观预测的股票未来收益较低，最悲观预测的股票未来收益较高。作者用代表性启发式解释这一现象，并构建模型量化预测偏差。这为基于分析师预测修正的逆向投资策略提供了理论和实证支持。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 分析师长期盈利增长预测的乐观/悲观程度（预测偏差）
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：美国股票；预测数据：分析师长期盈利增长预测（I/B/E/S）；组合构建：按预测分位数分组（最乐观/最悲观）；持有期：12个月（La Porta方法）；再平衡频率：年度
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 最乐观组收益低于最悲观的收益（平均月收益差约-0.3%至-0.5%），但论文未提供具体夏普比率或最大回撤。

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Deep learning for stock prediction using numerical and textual information
excerpt_en: This paper proposes a novel application of deep learning models, Paragraph Vector, and Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), to financial time series forecasting. Investors make decisions according to various factors, including consumer price index, price-earnings ratio, and miscellaneous events reported in newspapers. In order to assist their decisions in a timely manner, many automatic ways to analyze those information have been proposed in the last decade. However, many of them used either numerical or textual information, but not both for a single company. In this paper, we propose an approach that converts newspaper articles into their distributed representations via Paragraph Vector and models the temporal effects of past events on opening prices about multiple companies with LSTM. The performance of the proposed approach is demonstrated on real-world data of fifty companies listed on Tokyo Stock Exchange.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文提出使用深度学习模型（Paragraph Vector和LSTM）结合数值和文本信息预测股票开盘价，并在东京证券交易所的50家公司数据上验证了效果。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 基于Paragraph Vector和LSTM的混合模型，融合数值数据（如CPI、市盈率）和文本数据（新闻文章）进行价格预测
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：东京证券交易所股票；股票数量：50家；回溯期：未明确；调仓频率：未明确
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: No backtest data provided

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Measuring Qualitative Information in Capital Markets Research: Comparison of Alternative Methodologies to Measure Disclosure Tone
excerpt_en: ABSTRACT This study evaluates alternative measures of the tone of financial narrative. We present evidence that word-frequency tone measures based on domain-specific wordlists—compared to general wordlists—better predict the market reaction to earnings announcements, have greater statistical power in short-window event studies, and exhibit more economically consistent post-announcement drift. Further, inverse document frequency weighting, advocated in Loughran and McDonald (2011), provides little improvement to the alternative approach of equal weighting. We also provide evidence that word-frequency tone measures are as powerful as the Naïve Bayesian machine-learning tone measure from Li (2010) in a regression of future earnings on MD&A tone. Overall, although more complex techniques are potentially advantageous in certain contexts, equal-weighted, domain-specific, word-frequency tone measures are generally just as powerful in the context of financial disclosure and capital markets. Such measures are also more intuitive, easier to implement, and, importantly, far more amenable to replication.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文比较了衡量财务叙述语调的不同方法，发现基于领域特定词表的词频语调度量能更好地预测市场对盈利公告的反应，且具有更一致的经济表现。研究表明，等权重的领域特定词频度量与更复杂的机器学习方法同样有效，且更易于实施和复制。
ai_analysis.core_factors: Disclosure tone from financial narratives (earnings announcements, MD&A) using domain-specific word-frequency measures
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: Asset class: stocks; Event window: around earnings announcements; No specific lookback, rebalance frequency, or universe specified
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: Reports that domain-specific tone measures have greater statistical power and more consistent post-announcement drift, but no specific Sharpe or return metrics given

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Labor Hiring, Investment, and Stock Return Predictability in the Cross Section
excerpt_en: We study the impact of labor market frictions on asset prices. In the cross section of US firms, a 10 percentage point increase in the firm’s hiring rate is associated with a 1.5 percentage point decrease in the firm’s annual risk premium. We propose an investment-based model with stochastic labor adjustment costs to explain this finding. Firms with high hiring rates are expanding firms that incur high adjustment costs. If the economy experiences a shock that lowers adjustment costs, these firms benefit the most. The corresponding increase in firm value operates as a hedge against these shocks, explaining the lower risk premium of these firms in equilibrium.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该论文发现美国公司雇佣率与股票预期收益负相关：雇佣率每提高10个百分点，年风险溢价降低1.5个百分点。基于此，可以构建做空高雇佣率公司、做多低雇佣率公司的多空组合策略。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 雇佣率（员工人数的年度变化百分比）
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：美国股票；回看期：年度；调仓频率：年度；股票池：美国上市公司
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 论文未提供具体回测收益、夏普比率或最大回撤等指标

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Individual Investor Trading and Return Patterns around Earnings Announcements
excerpt_en: ABSTRACT This paper provides evidence of informed trading by individual investors around earnings announcements using a unique data set of NYSE stocks. We show that intense aggregate individual investor buying (selling) predicts large positive (negative) abnormal returns on and after earnings announcement dates. We decompose abnormal returns following the event into information and liquidity provision components, and show that about half of the returns can be attributed to private information. We also find that individuals trade in both return‐contrarian and news‐contrarian manners after earnings announcements. The latter behavior has the potential to slow the adjustment of prices to earnings news.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该论文研究了散户投资者在财报公告前后的交易行为与股票回报的关系，发现散户的净买入（卖出）能显著正向（负向）预测公告日及之后的异常收益。约一半的收益可归因于散户的私有信息，且散户在公告后表现出反向交易倾向，可能延缓价格调整。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 散户投资者净买入/净卖出量（交易不平衡）
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 美国NYSE股票，财报公告日事件窗口，日度散户交易数据，股票池为NYSE全部个股
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: No backtest data provided

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Connected Stocks
excerpt_en: ABSTRACT We connect stocks through their common active mutual fund owners. We show that the degree of shared ownership forecasts cross‐sectional variation in return correlation, controlling for exposure to systematic return factors, style and sector similarity, and many other pair characteristics. We argue that shared ownership causes this excess comovement based on evidence from a natural experiment—the 2003 mutual fund trading scandal. These results motivate a novel cross‐stock‐reversal trading strategy exploiting information contained in ownership connections. We show that long‐short hedge fund index returns covary negatively with this strategy, suggesting these funds may exacerbate this excess comovement.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该论文发现共同基金共同持股会导致股票间超额联动，并基于此构建了一种跨股票反转交易策略。通过利用持股关联中的信息，策略可以预测收益率的横截面变化。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 共同基金共同持股导致的超额联动
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: Not specified
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: No backtest data provided

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Do Fund Managers Misestimate Climatic Disaster Risk
excerpt_en: Abstract We examine whether professional money managers overreact to large climatic disasters. We find that managers within a major disaster region underweight disaster zone stocks to a much greater degree than distant managers and that this aversion to disaster zone stocks is related to a salience bias that decreases over time and distance from the disaster, rather than to superior information possessed by close managers. This overreaction can be costly to fund investors for some especially salient disasters like hurricanes and tornadoes: a long-short strategy that exploits the overreaction generates a significant DGTW-adjusted return over the following 2 years.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该论文研究了专业基金经理对大型气候灾难的过度反应，发现灾难区域的经理更倾向于减持受灾区域股票，这种偏差源于显著性偏差而非信息优势。基于此过度反应构建的多空策略在随后两年产生了显著的DGTW调整收益。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 行为偏差（显著性偏差）导致的过度反应，具体为对灾害区域股票的过度规避
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：股票（美国市场）；灾难事件：大型气候灾难（飓风、龙卷风等）；策略持有期：2年；再平衡频率：基于灾难事件发生时间；选股范围：受灾害影响区域的股票与未受影响区域的股票
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: DGTW-adjusted return显著为正，具体数值未明确给出，但提到显著且持续2年

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Asset Price Dynamics, Volatility, and Prediction
excerpt_en: This book shows how current and recent market prices convey information about the probability distributions that govern future prices. Moving beyond purely theoretical models, Stephen Taylor applies methods supported by empirical research of equity and foreign exchange markets to show how daily and more frequent asset prices, and the prices of option contracts, can be used to construct and assess predictions about future prices, their volatility, and their probability distributions. Stephen Taylor provides a comprehensive introduction to the dynamic behavior of asset prices, relying on finance theory and statistical evidence. He uses stochastic processes to define mathematical models for price dynamics, but with less mathematics than in alternative texts. The key topics covered include random walk tests, trading rules, ARCH models, stochastic volatility models, high-frequency datasets, and the information that option prices imply about volatility and distributions. Asset Price Dynamics, Volatility, and Prediction is ideal for students of economics, finance, and mathematics who are studying financial econometrics, and will enable researchers to identify and apply appropriate models and methods. It will likewise be a valuable resource for quantitative analysts, fund managers, risk managers, and investors who seek realistic expectations about future asset prices and the risks to which they are exposed.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本书介绍了如何利用当前和历史市场价格预测资产价格和波动率，涵盖交易规则、ARCH模型、随机波动率模型以及期权隐含信息。适合学生和从业者理解价格动态与预测方法。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 交易规则、ARCH模型、随机波动率模型、期权隐含波动率与分布
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: Not specified
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: No backtest data provided

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Forecasting Stock Prices from the Limit Order Book Using Convolutional Neural Networks
excerpt_en: In today's financial markets, where most trades are performed in their entirety by electronic means and the largest fraction of them is completely automated, an opportunity has risen from analyzing this vast amount of transactions. Since all the transactions are recorded in great detail, investors can analyze all the generated data and detect repeated patterns of the price movements. Being able to detect them in advance, allows them to take profitable positions or avoid anomalous events in the financial markets. In this work we proposed a deep learning methodology, based on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), that predicts the price movements of stocks, using as input large-scale, high-frequency time-series derived from the order book of financial exchanges. The dataset that we use contains more than 4 million limit order events and our comparison with other methods, like Multilayer Neural Networks and Support Vector Machines, shows that CNNs are better suited for this kind of task.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该论文提出使用卷积神经网络（CNN）从限价订单簿中的高频时间序列数据预测股票价格走势。实验表明，与其他方法（如多层神经网络和支持向量机）相比，CNN更适合此类预测任务。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 卷积神经网络（CNN）预测价格运动
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：股票；数据源：限价订单簿高频时间序列（超过400万个限价订单事件）；回测周期：未明确指定；调仓频率：未指定
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 与多层神经网络和支持向量机相比，CNN表现更优，但未提供具体的回报率、夏普比率等数值

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] A Comparison between ARIMA, LSTM, and GRU for Time Series Forecasting
excerpt_en: A critical area of machine learning is Time Series forecasting, as various forecasting problems contain a time component. A series of observations taken chronologically in time is known as a Time Series. In this research, however, we aim to compare three different machine learning models in making a time series forecast. We are going to use the Bitcoin's price dataset as our time series data set and make predictions accordingly. The results show that the ARIMA model gave better results than the deep learning-based regression models. ARIMA gives the best results at 2.76% and 302.53 for MAPE and RMSE respectively. The Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU) however performed better than the Long Short-term Memory (LSTM), with 3.97% and 381.34 of MAPE and RMSE respectively.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文比较了ARIMA、LSTM和GRU三种模型在比特币价格时间序列预测上的表现，发现ARIMA模型在MAPE和RMSE指标上优于深度学习模型，GRU表现优于LSTM。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 时间序列预测模型（ARIMA, LSTM, GRU）
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产：比特币；频率：未明确指定（可能为日频）；回溯期：未指定；再平衡频率：未指定
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: ARIMA: MAPE=2.76%, RMSE=302.53；GRU: MAPE=3.97%, RMSE=381.34；LSTM: 未提供具体数值

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Are Investors Really Reluctant to Realize Their Losses? Trading Responses to Past Returns and the Disposition Effect
excerpt_en: We examine how investor preferences and beliefs affect trading in relation to past gains and losses. The probability of selling as a function of profit is V-shaped; at short holding periods, investors are more likely to sell big losers than small ones. There is little evidence of an upward jump in selling at zero profits. These findings provide no clear indication that realization preference explains trading. Furthermore, the disposition effect is not driven by a simple direct preference for selling a stock by virtue of having a gain versus a loss. Trading based on belief revisions can potentially explain these findings. The Author 2012. Published by Oxford University Press on behalf of The Society for Financial Studies. All rights reserved. For Permissions, please e-mail: journals.permissions@oup.com., Oxford University Press.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文研究投资者对过去收益和损失的交易反应，发现卖出概率与利润呈V形关系，短期内投资者更倾向于卖出大损失股票，但无明显证据表明零利润处存在卖出跳跃。研究结果不支持实现偏好解释，而信念修正可能解释这些现象。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 处置效应（disposition effect）、信念修正（belief revisions）
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: Not specified
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: No backtest data provided

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Advances in Financial Machine Learning
excerpt_en: Machine learning (ML) is changing virtually every aspect of our lives. Today ML algorithms accomplish tasks that until recently only expert humans could perform. As it relates to finance, this is the most exciting time to adopt a disruptive technology that will transform how everyone invests for generations. Readers will learn how to structure Big data in a way that is amenable to ML algorithms; how to conduct research with ML algorithms on that data; how to use supercomputing methods; how to backtest your discoveries while avoiding false positives. The book addresses real-life problems faced by practitioners on a daily basis, and explains scientifically sound solutions using math, supported by code and examples. Readers become active users who can test the proposed solutions in their particular setting. Written by a recognized expert and portfolio manager, this book will equip investment professionals with the groundbreaking tools needed to succeed in modern finance.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本书系统讲解如何将机器学习应用于金融领域，涵盖大数据结构、算法研究、回测方法及避免过拟合，提供可操作的代码和案例。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 机器学习模型（如监督学习、特征工程、回测框架）
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: Not specified（通用方法，覆盖多种资产类别和周期）
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: No backtest data provided

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] An Institutional Theory of Momentum and Reversal
excerpt_en: We propose a theory of momentum and reversal based on flows between investment funds. Flows are triggered by changes in fund managers' efficiency, which investors either observe directly or infer from past performance. Momentum arises if flows exhibit inertia, and because rational prices underreact to expected future flows. Reversal arises because flows push prices away from fundamental values. Besides momentum and reversal, flows generate comovement, lead-lag effects, and amplification, with these being larger for high idiosyncratic risk assets. A calibration of our model using evidence on mutual fund returns and flows generates sizeable Sharpe ratios for momentum and value strategies. The Author 2013. Published by Oxford University Press on behalf of The Society for Financial Studies. All rights reserved. For Permissions, please e-mail: journals.permissions@oup.com., Oxford University Press.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文提出基于基金流量变动的动量和反转理论。动量源于流量惯性导致的价格反应不足，反转源于流量推动价格偏离基本面。通过共同基金收益和流量数据的校准，模型产生了显著的动量及价值策略夏普比率。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 基于基金流量和业绩推断的动量与反转信号，流量惯性和基本面偏离
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: Not specified (理论模型，基于共同基金数据校准)
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 动量及价值策略产生可观的夏普比率，但文中未给出具体数值。

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Lazy Prices
excerpt_en: ABSTRACT Using the complete history of regular quarterly and annual filings by U.S. corporations, we show that changes to the language and construction of financial reports have strong implications for firms’ future returns and operations. A portfolio that shorts “changers” and buys “nonchangers” earns up to 188 basis points per month in alpha (over 22% per year) in the future. Moreover, changes to 10‐Ks predict future earnings, profitability, future news announcements, and even future firm‐level bankruptcies. Unlike typical underreaction patterns, we find no announcement effect, suggesting that investors are inattentive to these simple changes across the universe of public firms.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该论文提出基于公司财务报告语言变化的交易策略，做空报告内容变化大的公司，买入变化小的公司，可获得显著超额收益（月alpha 188基点）。研究发现投资者对这类简单变化注意力不足。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 财务报告语言变化（10-K文件文本变化度量）
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：美国股票；回看窗口：季度和年度报告周期；再平衡频率：未指定；选股范围：美国上市公司
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 月alpha 188基点（年化22%），预测未来收益、盈利、破产等

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] The Cross-section of Expected Stock Returns
excerpt_en: This paper studies the cross-sectional properties of return forecasts derived from Fama-MacBeth regressions. These forecasts mimic how an investor could, in real time, combine many firm characteristics to obtain a composite estimate of a stockâ€™s expected return. Empirically, the forecasts vary substantially across stocks and have strong predictive power for actual returns. For example, using ten-year rolling estimates of Fama- MacBeth slopes and a cross-sectional model with 15 firm characteristics (all based on low-frequency data), the expected-return estimates have a cross-sectional standard deviation of 0.87% monthly and a predictive slope for future monthly returns of 0.74, with a standard error of 0.07.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文利用Fama-MacBeth回归将多种公司特征结合，实时预测股票预期收益，发现预测效果显著。基于15个低频特征的截面模型，其月度预测斜率高达0.74。
ai_analysis.core_factors: Fama-MacBeth回归结合多种公司特征
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 股票；十年滚动估计；月度再平衡；所有有数据的股票
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 预期收益截面标准差0.87%/月；未来月度收益预测斜率0.74，标准误0.07

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Regression Discontinuity and the Price Effects of Stock Market Indexing
excerpt_en: The Russell 1000 and 2000 stock indexes comprise the first 1000 and next 2000 largest firms ranked by market capitalization. Small changes in the capitalizations of firms ranked near 1000 move them between these indexes. Because the indexes are value-weighted, more money tracks the largest stocks in the Russell 2000 than the smallest in the Russell 1000. Using this discontinuity, we find that additions to the Russell 2000 result in price increases and deletions result in price declines. We then identify time trends in indexing effects and the types of funds that provide liquidity to indexers.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文利用Russell 1000和2000指数的断点回归设计，研究了指数成分股调整对股票价格的影响。发现加入Russell 2000导致价格上涨，删除导致价格下跌，并分析了时间趋势和提供流动性的基金类型。该策略可用于指数套利。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 指数成分股调整效应（index inclusion/exclusion effect），断点回归设计，市值边界附近的股票
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：美国股票；观察期：指数调整前后；调仓频率：年度；股票池：Russell 1000和2000边界附近的股票
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 加入Russell 2000导致价格上升，删除导致价格下降；未提供夏普比率、胜率等指标

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] The Flash Crash: High-Frequency Trading in an Electronic Market
excerpt_en: We study intraday market intermediation in an electronic market before and during a period of large and temporary selling pressure. On May 6, 2010, U.S. financial markets experienced a systemic intraday event - the Flash Crash - where a large automated selling program was rapidly executed in the E-mini S&P 500 stock index futures market. Using audit trail transaction-level data for the E-mini on May 6 and the previous three days, we find that the trading pattern of the most active nondesignated intraday intermediaries (classified as High Frequency Traders) did not change when prices fell during the Flash Crash.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文研究了2010年5月6日闪电崩盘期间，电子市场中高频交易者（HFT）作为中介的日内交易行为。使用E-mini S&P 500期货的审计追踪数据，发现最活跃的非指定日内中介（高频交易者）在价格下跌时的交易模式并未改变。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 高频交易者（HFT）的日内中介交易模式
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: E-mini S&P 500期货，2010年5月6日及前三个交易日，日内逐笔数据
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: No backtest data provided

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Investors' Horizons and the Amplification of Market Shocks
excerpt_en: This paper shows that during episodes of market turmoil, 13F institutional investors with short trading horizons sell their stockholdings to a larger extent than 13F institutional investors with longer trading horizons. This creates price pressure for stocks held mostly by short-horizon investors, which, as a consequence, experience larger price drops, and subsequent reversals, than stocks held mostly by long-horizon investors. These findings, obtained after controlling for the withdrawals experienced by the investors, are not driven by other institutional investors' and firms' characteristics. Overall, the evidence indicates that investors with short horizons amplify the effects of market-wide negative shocks by demanding liquidity at times when other potential buyers'capital is scarce.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文发现，在市场动荡期间，短期机构投资者比长期机构投资者更倾向于抛售股票，导致其重仓股价格大幅下跌并随后反转。投资者可利用机构持股期限分类，在负面冲击后买入短期投资者持有较多的股票，押注其价格反转。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 短期机构持股比例、市场冲击事件、流动性需求
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 美股，基于13F季度持仓数据，调仓频率为季度，投资者期限分类方法未明确
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: No backtest data provided

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] How Does Social Media Impact Bitcoin Value? A Test of the Silent Majority Hypothesis
excerpt_en: Bitcoin’s emergence has the potential to pave the way for a technological revolution in financial markets. What determines its valuation is an important open question with far-reaching business and policy implications. Building on information systems and finance literature, we examine the dynamic interactions between social media and the monetary value of bitcoin using textual analysis and vector error correction models. We show that more bullish forum posts are associated with higher future bitcoin values. Interestingly, social media’s effects on bitcoin are driven primarily by the silent majority, the 95 percent of users who are less active and whose contributions amount to less than 40 percent of total messages. In addition, messages on an Internet forum, relative to tweets, have a stronger impact on future bitcoin value. Overall, our findings reveal that social media sentiment is an important predictor in determining bitcoin’s valuation, but not all social media messages are of equal impact. This study offers new insights into the digital currency market and the economic impact of social media.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文研究社交媒体情绪（论坛帖子和推文）对比特币价值的影响，发现低调用户（“沉默的大多数”）的看涨帖子对未来比特币价格有更强的预测能力。研究使用文本分析和向量误差修正模型来量化这些影响。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 社交媒体情绪（尤其是不活跃用户的看涨情绪），文本分析，向量误差修正模型
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产：比特币；回溯期：未指定；再平衡频率：未指定；标的范围：仅比特币
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 未提供回测数据

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] An Anatomy of Commodity Futures Risk Premia
excerpt_en: ABSTRACT We identify two types of risk premia in commodity futures returns: spot premia related to the risk in the underlying commodity, and term premia related to changes in the basis. Sorting on forecasting variables such as the futures basis, return momentum, volatility, inflation, hedging pressure, and liquidity results in sizable spot premia between 5% and 14% per annum and term premia between 1% and 3% per annum. We show that a single factor, the high‐minus‐low portfolio from basis sorts, explains the cross‐section of spot premia. Two additional basis factors are needed to explain the term premia.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该论文识别了商品期货回报中的两种风险溢价：现货溢价和期限溢价。通过基于期货基差、动量、波动率、通胀、对冲压力和流动性等预测变量进行排序，发现了可观的溢价。研究表明，基差排序的高减低组合可以解释现货溢价的横截面，而额外的基差因子可以解释期限溢价。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 期货基差、动量、波动率、通胀、对冲压力、流动性
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：商品期货；排序周期：未明确说明，但通常为月度；调仓频率：月度；标的范围：多种商品期货
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 现货溢价：年化5%-14%；期限溢价：年化1%-3%

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Prospect Theory and Stock Returns: An Empirical Test
excerpt_en: We test the hypothesis that, when thinking about allocating money to a stock, investors mentally represent the stock by the distribution of its past returns and then evaluate this distribution in the way described by prospect theory. In a simple model of asset prices where some investors think in this way, a stock whose past return dis-tribution has a high (low) prospect theory value earns a low (high) subsequent return, on average. We find empirical support for this prediction in the cross-section of U.S. stock returns, particularly among small-capitalization stocks where less sophisticated investors are likely to have a bigger impact on prices. We repeat our tests in 46 inter-national stock markets and find a similar pattern in a majority of these markets. JEL classification: D03

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该论文提出基于前景理论评估股票过去收益分布，认为具有高前景理论价值的股票未来收益较低。通过美国及46个国际股票市场数据验证了这一预测，尤其在小型股中效果显著，提供了一个行为金融驱动的多空交易信号。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 前景理论价值（基于过去收益分布的累积前景理论估值）
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 股票市场（美国及国际），回望期未明确，调仓频率未明确，选股范围为全市场（尤其小盘股）
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: No backtest data provided

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Factors That Fit the Time Series and Cross-Section of Stock Returns
excerpt_en: Abstract We propose a new method for estimating latent asset pricing factors that fit the time series and cross-section of expected returns. Our estimator generalizes principal component analysis (PCA) by including a penalty on the pricing error in expected returns. Our approach finds weak factors with high Sharpe ratios that PCA cannot detect. We discover five factors with economic meaning that explain well the cross-section and time series of characteristic-sorted portfolio returns. The out-of-sample maximum Sharpe ratio of our factors is twice as large as with PCA with substantially smaller pricing errors. Our factors imply that a significant amount of characteristic information is redundant. Authors have furnished an Internet Appendix, which is available on the Oxford University Press Web site next to the link to the final published paper online.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该论文提出一种新的惩罚主成分分析方法，用于估计既能拟合时间序列又能拟合横截面预期收益的潜在因子。该方法能发现PCA无法捕捉的具有高夏普比率的弱因子，并识别出五个具有经济含义的因子。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 基于定价误差惩罚的主成分分析（PCA）因子
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: Not specified
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: Out-of-sample maximum Sharpe ratio twice as large as PCA, substantially smaller pricing errors

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Momentum in Corporate Bond Returns
excerpt_en: This paper documents significant momentum in a comprehensive sample of 81, 491 U.S. corporate bonds with both transaction and dealer-quote data from 1973 to 2011. Momentum is driven by noninvestment grade (NIG) bonds. Momentum profits have increased over time, along with the growth of this segment. From 1991 to 2011, they average 59 basis points (bps) per month across all bonds and 192 bps in NIG bonds. NIG bonds issued by private firms earn even higher profits (282 bps). Momentum profits do not appear to compensate for risk or persist as a result of trading frictions. Bond momentum is not just a manifestation of equity momentum. The Author 2013. Published by Oxford University Press on behalf of The Society for Financial Studies. All rights reserved. For Permissions, please e-mail: journals.permissions@oup.com., Oxford University Press.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文研究了美国公司债券的动量效应，特别是非投资级债券，发现显著的动量利润。1991年至2011年间，所有债券平均月度收益为59个基点，非投资级债券为192个基点，私人发行的非投资级债券高达282个基点。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 动量 (momentum)
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：美国公司债券；重新平衡频率：月度；样本：1973-2011年间的81,491只债券，重点关注非投资级债券。具体回溯期未在摘要中指定。
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 所有债券平均月度收益59个基点，非投资级债券192个基点，私人发行的非投资级债券282个基点（1991-2011年）。未提供夏普比率、胜率或最大回撤。

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] News Trading and Speed
excerpt_en: ABSTRACT We compare the optimal trading strategy of an informed speculator when he can trade ahead of incoming news (is “fast”), versus when he cannot (is “slow”). We find that speed matters: the fast speculator's trades account for a larger fraction of trading volume, and are more correlated with short‐run price changes. Nevertheless, he realizes a large fraction of his profits from trading on long‐term price changes. The fast speculator's behavior matches evidence about high‐frequency traders. We predict that stocks with more informative news are more liquid even though they attract more activity from informed high‐frequency traders.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该论文比较了知情交易者在新闻发布前能否提前交易（快速）与不能提前交易（缓慢）时的最优策略。研究发现，快速交易者的交易量占比更大，且与短期价格变化相关性更高，但其大部分利润来自长期价格变化。该行为与高频交易者的特征相符。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 新闻交易、速度优势
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: Not specified
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: No backtest data provided

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] The Devil in HML’s Details
excerpt_en: In this article the authors challenge the standard method for measuring value that is used in academic work on factor pricing. The standard method uses lagged book data to calculate book-to-price (B/P) at portfolio formation. It aligns price data using the same lag, ignoring recent price movements. The authors propose two simple alternatives that use more timely price data; they then construct portfolios based on the different measures for a U.S. sample (from 1950 to 2011) and a global sample (from 1983 to 2011). They show that B/P ratios based on more timely prices better forecast true, unobservable B/P ratios at fiscal year-end. Value portfolios based on the timeliest measures earn statistically significant alphas, ranging between 305 and 378 basis points per year, versus the standard methods. <bold>TOPICS:</bold> <ext-link>Portfolio construction</ext-link>, <ext-link>statistical methods</ext-link>, <ext-link>accounting and ratio analysis</ext-link>

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文挑战了标准价值因子（HML）的构建方法，提出使用更及时的价格数据计算账面市值比（B/P），并基于此构建价值组合。实证显示，改进后的价值组合能获得显著超额收益（年化305-378基点），优于传统滞后数据方法。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 价值因子（Value Factor）：基于更及时价格数据的账面市值比（B/P）。
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：美国及全球股票；样本期：美国1950-2011，全球1983-2011；组合构建频率：年度；股票筛选：基于账面市值比排序的多空组合。
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 年化超额收益305-378基点（统计显著），与传统方法比较的alpha为正。具体夏普比率、最大回撤未报告。

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Analyst Recommendations, Mutual Fund Herding, and Overreaction in Stock Prices
excerpt_en: This paper documents that mutual funds “herd” (trade together) into stocks with consensus sell-side analyst upgrades, and herd out of stocks with consensus downgrades. This influence of analyst recommendation changes on fund herding is stronger for downgrades, and among managers with greater career concerns. These findings indicate that career-concerned managers are incentivized to follow analyst information, and that managers have a greater tendency to herd on negative stock information, given the greater reputational and litigation risk of holding losing stocks. Furthermore, starting in the mid-1990s (when aggregate mutual fund equity ownership is significantly higher), stocks traded by career-concerned herds of fund managers in response to analyst recommendation changes experience a significant same-quarter price impact, followed by a sharp subsequent price reversal. Our evidence suggests that analyst recommendation revisions induce herding by career-concerned fund managers, and that this type of trading has become price destabilizing with the increasing level of mutual fund ownership of stocks. This paper was accepted by Wei Jiang, finance.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文发现共同基金会根据分析师推荐变化进行羊群交易，尤其是对降级反应更强烈，导致股票价格短期冲击后出现大幅反转。这一现象可用于构建反向交易策略，即在羊群买入后做空、羊群卖出后做多。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 基于分析师推荐变化的共同基金羊群行为导致的股价过度反应与反转
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 美股市场，季度频率，关注分析师一致推荐变化与共同基金持仓变化
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 报告了同期价格冲击和随后显著反转，但未提供具体收益率或夏普比率

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Leverage Aversion and Risk Parity
excerpt_en: The authors show that leverage aversion changes the predictions of modern portfolio theory: Safer assets must offer higher risk-adjusted returns than riskier assets. Consuming the high risk-adjusted returns of safer assets requires leverage, creating an opportunity for investors with the ability to apply leverage. Risk parity portfolios exploit this opportunity by equalizing the risk allocation across asset classes, thus overweighting safer assets relative to their weight in the market portfolio.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文提出，杠杆厌恶使得安全资产的风险调整后收益高于风险资产，而风险平价组合通过平衡各类资产的风险贡献，超配安全资产从而利用这一机会。该策略具有较强的可实施性。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 风险平价（等风险贡献）
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: Not specified
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: No backtest data provided

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Anomalies and News
excerpt_en: ABSTRACT Using a sample of 97 stock return anomalies, we find that anomaly returns are 50% higher on corporate news days and six times higher on earnings announcement days. These results could be explained by dynamic risk, mispricing due to biased expectations, or data mining. We develop and conduct several unique tests to differentiate between these three explanations. Our results are most consistent with the idea that anomaly returns are driven by biased expectations, which are at least partly corrected upon news arrival.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 研究了97个股票异常回报，发现异常回报在公司新闻日高出50%，在盈利公告日高出6倍，支持错误定价理论。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 异常回报在新闻事件（尤其是盈利公告）附近放大
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: Not specified
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: Anomaly returns are 50% higher on corporate news days and six times higher on earnings announcement days.

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Optimal versus Naive Diversification: How Inefficient Is the 1/N Portfolio Strategy?
excerpt_en: This chapter evaluates the out-of-sample performance of the sample-based mean-variance model, and its extensions designed to reduce estimation error, relative to the naive 1/N portfolio. Of the fourteen models the chapter evaluates across seven empirical datasets, none is consistently better than the 1/N rule in terms of Sharpe ratio, certainty-equivalent return, or turnover, which indicates that, out of sample, the gain from optimal diversification is more than offset by estimation error. Based on parameters calibrated to the US equity market, the analytical results and simulations show that the estimation window needed for the sample-based mean-variance strategy and its extensions to outperform the 1/N benchmark is around 3000 months for a portfolio with Twenty-five assets and about 6000 months for a portfolio with fifty assets. This suggests that there are still many “miles to go” before the gains promised by optimal portfolio choice can actually be realized out of sample.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文比较了基于样本的均值-方差优化模型及其扩展与简单的1/N等权重投资组合策略的样本外表现。在七个实证数据集上，没有任何复杂模型在夏普比率、确定性等价收益或换手率方面持续优于1/N规则，表明估计误差抵消了优化带来的收益。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 1/N等权重规则 vs 均值-方差优化
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：美国股票；估计窗口：25只资产需3000个月，50只资产需6000个月；调仓频率：未明确指定（通常为月度）
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 夏普比率、确定性等价收益和换手率被比较，1/N策略在样本外通常优于优化模型

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Weather-Induced Mood, Institutional Investors, and Stock Returns
excerpt_en: This study shows that weather-based indicators of mood impact perceptions of mispricing and trading decisions of institutional investors. Using survey and disaggregated trade data, we show that relatively cloudier days increase perceived overpricing in individual stocks and the Dow Jones Industrial Index and increase selling propensities of institutions. We introduce stock-level measures of investor mood; investor optimism positively impacts stock returns among stocks with higher arbitrage costs, and stocks experiencing similar investor mood exhibit return comovement. These findings complement existing studies on how weather impacts stock index returns and identify another channel through which it can manifest.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本研究发现天气引起的情绪影响机构投资者的交易决策，导致错误定价。投资者乐观情绪对具有较高套利成本的股票收益有正向影响，且经历相似情绪的股票存在收益联动。该研究为基于天气情绪的量化策略提供了依据。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 天气引起的投资者情绪（如阴天导致高估感知和卖出倾向）
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 美国股票（道琼斯工业指数及个股），未指定回溯期和调仓频率，股票池为高套利成本股票。
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 未提供回测数据

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Looking for Someone to Blame: Delegation, Cognitive Dissonance, and the Disposition Effect
excerpt_en: ABSTRACT We analyze brokerage data and an experiment to test a cognitive dissonance based theory of trading: investors avoid realizing losses because they dislike admitting that past purchases were mistakes, but delegation reverses this effect by allowing the investor to blame the manager instead. Using individual trading data, we show that the disposition effect—the propensity to realize past gains more than past losses—applies only to nondelegated assets like individual stocks; delegated assets, like mutual funds, exhibit a robust reverse‐disposition effect. In an experiment, we show that increasing investors' cognitive dissonance results in both a larger disposition effect in stocks and a larger reverse‐disposition effect in funds. Additionally, increasing the salience of delegation increases the reverse‐disposition effect in funds. Cognitive dissonance provides a unified explanation for apparently contradictory investor behavior across asset classes and has implications for personal investment decisions, mutual fund management, and intermediation.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该论文研究了委托效应如何影响投资者的处置效应，即投资者在非委托资产（如个股）中倾向于过早卖出盈利股而持有亏损股，但在委托资产（如共同基金）中表现出反向处置效应。通过经纪数据和实验，作者发现认知失调理论可以解释这种差异，并探讨了其对投资决策和基金管理的启示。
ai_analysis.core_factors: disposition effect, cognitive dissonance, delegation
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: Not specified
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: No backtest data provided

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] The Joint Cross Section of Stocks and Options
excerpt_en: ABSTRACT Stocks with large increases in call (put) implied volatilities over the previous month tend to have high (low) future returns. Sorting stocks ranked into decile portfolios by past call implied volatilities produces spreads in average returns of approximately 1% per month, and the return differences persist up to six months. The cross section of stock returns also predicts option implied volatilities, with stocks with high past returns tending to have call and put option contracts that exhibit increases in implied volatility over the next month, but with decreasing realized volatility. These predictability patterns are consistent with rational models of informed trading.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该论文提出基于期权隐含波动率变化的多空策略：过去一个月看涨期权隐含波动率上升的股票未来收益较高，看跌期权隐含波动率上升的股票未来收益较低。按看涨期权隐含波动率排序构建十分位组合，月收益差约为1%，且可持续六个月。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 看涨期权和看跌期权隐含波动率过去一个月的变动
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：股票与期权；回溯期：1个月；调仓频率：月度；选股范围：具有期权交易的股票
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 月收益差约1%，可持续六个月；无夏普比率或最大回撤数据

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Coping with the Risk of Interest-Rate Fluctuations: Returns to Bondholders From Naïve and Optimal Strategies*
excerpt_en: This chapter examines the investment performance of an index of long-term, high-grade bonds, using the same method of analysis as that appropriate for common stocks. It shows that long-term bonds have given both lower average return and more than proportionately lower dispersion than would have been obtained from holding a well-diversified portfolio of common stocks listed on the New York Stock Exchange. The chapter develops an optimal strategy for bond investments, given a definite time horizon. It analyses a strategy for taking advantage of the specificity of the promises of bonds to eliminate almost completely the riskiness of investments in high-grade bonds caused by unanticipated fluctuations in interest rates. The chapter also shows that an asset nearly free of risk from interest-rate fluctuations can be affected for holding periods of five, ten, and twenty years by appropriate use of high-grade bonds. It suggests that variability of bondholder's returns is, proportionately much less than the average variability of stockholder's returns.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本论文研究了长期高等级债券的投资表现，并与股票进行比较。提出了一个最优债券投资策略，通过在特定持有期内利用债券承诺的特性几乎完全消除利率波动风险。分析了朴素策略与最优策略的回报差异。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 债券免疫或久期匹配策略，利用债券承诺特性消除利率风险
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：长期高等级债券；持有期：5年、10年、20年；再平衡频率：未指定；投资范围：未指定
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 报告了债券比股票有更低平均回报和更低离散度，但未提供具体数值

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Deep Learning-Based Stock Price Prediction Using LSTM and Bi-Directional LSTM Model
excerpt_en: In the financial world, the forecasting of stock price gains significant attraction. For the growth of shareholders in a company's stock, stock price prediction has a great consideration to increase the interest of speculators for investing money to the company. The successful prediction of a stock's future cost could return noteworthy benefit. Different types of approaches are taken in forecasting stock trend in the previous years. In this research, a new stock price prediction framework is proposed utilizing two popular models; Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) model i.e. Long Short Term Memory (LSTM) model, and Bi-Directional Long Short Term Memory (BI-LSTM) model. From the simulation results, it can be noted that using these RNN models i.e. LSTM, and BI-LSTM with proper hyper-parameter tuning, our proposed scheme can forecast future stock trend with high accuracy. The RMSE for both LSTM and BI-LSTM model was measured by varying the number of epochs, hidden layers, dense layers, and different units used in hidden layers to find a better model that can be used to forecast future stock prices precisely. The assessments are conducted by utilizing a freely accessible dataset for stock markets having open, high, low, and closing prices.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该论文提出使用LSTM和双向LSTM模型基于历史OHLC数据预测股票价格，通过超参数调优提高预测精度，以RMSE为评价指标。
ai_analysis.core_factors: LSTM, Bi-LSTM, 深度学习, 历史价格数据
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：股票；特征：开盘价、最高价、最低价、收盘价；回看周期：未指定；调仓频率：未指定；数据集：公开可获得
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 报告了不同参数配置下LSTM和Bi-LSTM模型的RMSE值，未提供交易策略回报率、夏普比率等指标

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] The Structure of Voluntary Disclosure Narratives: Evidence from Tone Dispersion
excerpt_en: ABSTRACT We examine tone dispersion, or the degree to which tone words are spread evenly within a narrative, to evaluate whether narrative structure provides insight into managers’ voluntary disclosures and users’ responses to those disclosures. We find that tone dispersion is associated with current aggregate and disaggregated performance and future performance, managers’ financial reporting decisions, and managers’ incentives and actions to manage perceptions. Furthermore, we find that tone dispersion is associated with analysts’ and investors’ responses to conference call narratives. Our results suggest that tone dispersion both reflects and affects the information that managers convey through their narratives.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文研究管理层自愿披露叙述中的语气分散度，发现其与当前及未来业绩、财务报告决策以及分析师和投资者反应相关。该发现可用于开发基于叙述结构的交易信号，但需要进一步转化为可执行策略。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 语气分散度（tone dispersion），即叙述中语气词的分布均匀程度
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：股票；数据来源：财报电话会议记录；分析周期：电话会议后短期反应；未明确指定回测参数。
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 未提供直接交易策略回测数据，仅报告了语气分散度与市场反应的相关性分析。

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] It’s All in the Timing: Simple Active Portfolio Strategies that Outperform Naïve Diversification
excerpt_en: Abstract DeMiguel, Garlappi, and Uppal (2009) report that naïve diversification dominates mean-variance optimization in out-of-sample asset allocation tests. Our analysis suggests that this is largely due to their research design, which focuses on portfolios that are subject to high estimation risk and extreme turnover. We find that mean-variance optimization often outperforms naïve diversification, but turnover can erode its advantage in the presence of transaction costs. To address this issue, we develop 2 new methods of mean-variance portfolio selection (volatility timing and reward-to-risk timing) that deliver portfolios characterized by low turnover. These timing strategies outperform naïve diversification even in the presence of high transaction costs.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文提出了两种基于波动率和风险收益比的市场择时策略，通过降低换手率来改进均值-方差优化，在计入交易成本后仍能超越简单的分散化投资策略。
ai_analysis.core_factors: Volatility timing and reward-to-risk timing
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: Asset class: not specified; lookback period: not specified; rebalance frequency: likely monthly; universe: not specified
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: No backtest data provided in abstract

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Stock Returns over the FOMC Cycle
excerpt_en: ABSTRACT We document that since 1994, the equity premium is earned entirely in weeks 0, 2, 4, and 6 in Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) cycle time, that is, even weeks starting from the last FOMC meeting. We causally tie this fact to the Fed by studying intermeeting target changes, Fed funds futures, and internal Board of Governors meetings. The Fed has affected the stock market via unexpectedly accommodating policy, leading to large reductions in the equity premium. Evidence suggests systematic informal communication of Fed officials with the media and financial sector as a channel through which news about monetary policy has reached the market.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文发现自1994年以来，股市溢价完全出现在FOMC周期的第0、2、4、6周（从上次FOMC会议开始算起的偶数周）。这一现象与美联储的意外宽松政策和非正式沟通渠道有关，提供了一个基于FOMC会议日期的交易策略。
ai_analysis.core_factors: FOMC周期时间效应：在FOMC会议后的特定偶数周买入股票
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: Asset class: US equities; Lookback period: since 1994; Rebalance frequency: weekly, based on FOMC cycle weeks 0,2,4,6; Universe: broad US stock market
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: No backtest data provided

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Nonlinear Shrinkage of the Covariance Matrix for Portfolio Selection: Markowitz Meets Goldilocks
excerpt_en: Markowitz (1952) portfolio selection requires an estimator of the covariance matrix of returns. To address this problem, we promote a nonlinear shrinkage estimator that is more flexible than previous linear shrinkage estimators and has just the right number of free parameters (i.e., the Goldilocks principle). This number is the same as the number of assets. Our nonlinear shrinkage estimator is asymptotically optimal for portfolio selection when the number of assets is of the same magnitude as the sample size. In backtests with historical stock return data, it performs better than previous proposals and, in particular, it dominates linear shrinkage. Received January 21, 2014; editorial decision January 25, 2017 by Editor Geert Bekaert.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文提出一种用于Markowitz投资组合选择的协方差矩阵非线性收缩估计方法，该方法比线性收缩更灵活且渐近最优。在历史股票收益数据的回测中，该方法表现优于线性收缩等其他方法。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 非线性收缩的协方差矩阵估计
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：股票；历史数据回测，但具体回溯期、调仓频率和选股范围未明确说明。
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 回测中表现优于线性收缩等先前方法，但未提供具体回报率、夏普比率等数值。

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Stock Options as Lotteries
excerpt_en: ABSTRACT We investigate the relationship between ex ante total skewness and holding returns on individual equity options. Recent theoretical developments predict a negative relationship between total skewness and average returns, in contrast to the traditional view that only coskewness is priced. We find, consistent with recent theory, that total skewness exhibits a strong negative relationship with average option returns. Differences in average returns for option portfolios sorted on ex ante skewness range from 10% to 50% per week, even after controlling for risk. Our findings suggest that these large premiums compensate intermediaries for bearing unhedgeable risk when accommodating investor demand for lottery‐like options.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 研究股票期权的偏度与预期收益关系，发现基于事前偏度构建的期权组合周收益差异达10%-50%，支持彩票型期权偏好理论。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 期权偏度（股票期权的事前总偏度）
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：个股期权；回测周期：未明确说明，但使用每周排序；再平衡频率：每周；投资范围：个股期权
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 周收益差异10%-50%，控制风险后仍显著

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Deep hedging
excerpt_en: We present a framework for hedging a portfolio of derivatives in the presence of market frictions such as transaction costs, liquidity constraints or risk limits using modern deep reinforcement machine learning methods. We discuss how standard reinforcement learning methods can be applied to non-linear reward structures, i.e. in our case convex risk measures. As a general contribution to the use of deep learning for stochastic processes, we also show in Section 4 that the set of constrained trading strategies used by our algorithm is large enough to ε-approximate any optimal solution. Our algorithm can be implemented efficiently even in high-dimensional situations using modern machine learning tools. Its structure does not depend on specific market dynamics, and generalizes across hedging instruments including the use of liquid derivatives. Its computational performance is largely invariant in the size of the portfolio as it depends mainly on the number of hedging instruments available. We illustrate our approach by an experiment on the S&P500 index and by showing the effect on hedging under transaction costs in a synthetic market driven by the Heston model, where we outperform the standard ‘complete-market’ solution.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 提出一种使用深度强化学习对冲投资组合的方法，考虑了交易成本、流动性限制等市场摩擦，通过凸风险度量处理非线性奖励结构，并在S&P500指数和Heston模型合成市场上验证了优于标准完全市场解的效果。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 深度强化学习, 凸风险度量, 模型无关对冲
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别: 股票指数(S&P500)及合成市场(Heston模型); 回看期: 未指定; 再平衡频率: 未指定; 投资组合: 衍生品组合
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 声称优于标准完全市场解，但未提供具体回测指标（如夏普比率、最大回撤等）

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Uncovering Hedge Fund Skill from the Portfolio Holdings They Hide
excerpt_en: ABSTRACT This paper studies the “confidential holdings” of institutional investors, especially hedge funds, where the quarter‐end equity holdings are disclosed with a delay through amendments to Form 13F and are usually excluded from the standard databases. Funds managing large risky portfolios with nonconventional strategies seek confidentiality more frequently. Stocks in these holdings are disproportionately associated with information‐sensitive events or share characteristics indicating greater information asymmetry. Confidential holdings exhibit superior performance up to 12 months, and tend to take longer to build. Together the evidence supports private information and the associated price impact as the dominant motives for confidentiality.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该论文研究了对冲基金通过13F修正案延迟披露的保密持仓，发现这些持仓具有私人信息优势，并在未来12个月内表现优异。模仿此类持仓可能产生超额收益。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 对冲基金保密持仓（包含信息不对称特征）
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：美国股票；数据源：13F表格及修正案；调仓频率：季度（披露后）；持仓筛选：仅包含保密申报部分。
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 保密持仓在披露后12个月内表现优于非保密持仓，但未提供具体夏普比率或最大回撤。

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] What Are We Meeting For? The Consequences of Private Meetings with Investors
excerpt_en: Regulation Fair Disclosure was passed in 2000 in response to the concern that certain investors were gaining selective access to privileged firm information. In spite of the passage of this regulation, some investors continue to meet privately with executives. Using a unique set of proprietary records of all one-on-one meetings between senior management and investors for a New York Stock Exchange-traded firm, we investigate the impact of private meetings on investor decisions. We find that when investors meet privately with management they make more informed trading decisions. This improvement in trading is concentrated in hedge funds, but is not present for investment advisors or pension funds. Overall, our results suggest that private meetings help a select group of investors make more informed trading decisions.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该论文研究了投资者与公司管理层私下会议的影响，发现此类会议帮助特定投资者（尤其是对冲基金）做出更知情的交易决策，表明私下会议提供了信息优势。但未提出具体的、可复制的交易策略。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 私下会议信息、信息不对称
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: Not specified
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: No backtest data provided

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Size Anomalies in U.S. Bank Stock Returns
excerpt_en: ABSTRACT The largest commercial bank stocks, ranked by total size of the balance sheet, have significantly lower risk‐adjusted returns than small‐ and medium‐sized bank stocks, even though large banks are significantly more levered. We uncover a size factor in the component of bank returns that is orthogonal to the standard risk factors, including small minus big, which has the right covariance with bank returns to explain the average risk‐adjusted returns. This factor measures size‐dependent exposure to bank‐specific tail risk. These findings are consistent with government guarantees that protect shareholders of large banks, but not small banks, in disaster states.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该研究发现美国银行股中存在规模异常：大型银行的风险调整后收益显著低于中小型银行，且该效应无法被标准风险因子（包括规模因子SMB）完全解释。作者构建了一个与标准因子正交的银行规模因子，认为其反映了与银行特定尾部风险相关的规模依赖性暴露，并符合政府担保对大型银行股东的保护假说。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 银行股规模因子（与标准风险因子正交的银行规模效应）
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：美国银行股（商业银行）；回看期：未明确；调仓频率：未明确；标的范围：按总资产负债表规模排序的银行股。
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 未提供具体回测数据，仅报告大型银行显著更低的风险调整后收益。

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Carry Trades and Global Foreign Exchange Volatility
excerpt_en: ABSTRACT We investigate the relation between global foreign exchange (FX) volatility risk and the cross section of excess returns arising from popular strategies that borrow in low interest rate currencies and invest in high interest rate currencies, so‐called “carry trades.” We find that high interest rate currencies are negatively related to innovations in global FX volatility, and thus deliver low returns in times of unexpected high volatility, when low interest rate currencies provide a hedge by yielding positive returns. Furthermore, we show that volatility risk dominates liquidity risk and our volatility risk proxy also performs well for pricing returns of other portfolios.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文研究了全球外汇波动率风险与套息交易回报之间的关系。研究发现，高利率货币与全球外汇波动率的意外变化负相关，因此在波动率意外升高时回报较低，而低利率货币则提供对冲。波动率风险优于流动性风险，并能良好地解释其他投资组合的回报。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 套息交易（利差）及全球外汇波动率风险
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：外汇；回溯期：未明确指定；调仓频率：通常为月度；标的范围：主要货币对
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 未提供具体回测数据

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Do Corporate Site Visits Impact Stock Prices?
excerpt_en: ABSTRACT We examine the stock price impact of corporate site visits using a unique data set of site visits to listed firms in China. Our main findings are as follows. First, the market reaction around corporate site visits is statistically and economically significant and is stronger for group visits, visits conducted by mutual fund managers, visits covering accounting and finance topics, visits to firms with poor information environments, and visits to manufacturing firms. Second, the stock returns around site visits are positively associated with firms’ future performance. Third, the changes in visiting funds’ holdings are more predictive of firms’ future performance than those of nonvisiting funds. Overall, this study contributes to the literature by providing evidence that site visits are important venues for investors to collect information about firms and make informed trades.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该论文研究企业实地考察对股价的影响，发现考察期间的市场反应显著且与未来公司表现正相关，可作为一种信息驱动型交易策略。考察的类型、参与者和企业特征会影响策略效果。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 企业实地考察事件本身作为信号；考察者类型（如共同基金）和考察主题（会计、金融）
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 中国市场上市公司；事件研究法；依赖实地考察数据（非公开可得）
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 市场反应在统计和经济上显著；考察期间股票收益与公司未来表现正相关；未提供具体夏普比率或回测数据

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] The TIPS‐Treasury Bond Puzzle
excerpt_en: ABSTRACT We show that the price of a Treasury bond and an inflation‐swapped Treasury Inflation‐Protected Securities (TIPS) issue exactly replicating the cash flows of the Treasury bond can differ by more than $20 per $100 notional. Treasury bonds are almost always overvalued relative to TIPS. Total TIPS‐Treasury mispricing has exceeded $56 billion, representing nearly 8% of the total amount of TIPS outstanding. We find direct evidence that the mispricing narrows as additional capital flows into the markets. This provides strong support for the slow‐moving‐capital explanation of arbitrage persistence.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文揭示了TIPS（通胀保值债券）与国债之间存在显著定价偏差，国债通常被高估。通过构建复制现金流组合，可以实施套利策略，且随着资本流入，价差会收敛。该研究为缓慢移动资本解释提供了有力证据。
ai_analysis.core_factors: TIPS与国债之间的价差（mispricing）作为套利信号。
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：美国国债和TIPS；通过复制现金流进行套利；具体参数未明确说明。
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 报告了每100美元名义本金价差超过20美元，总错误定价超过560亿美元，占TIPS存量的近8%。未提供夏普比率或回测数据。

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Sparse Signals in the Cross‐Section of Returns
excerpt_en: ABSTRACT This paper applies the Least Absolute Shrinkage and Selection Operator (LASSO) to make rolling one‐minute‐ahead return forecasts using the entire cross‐section of lagged returns as candidate predictors. The LASSO increases both out‐of‐sample fit and forecast‐implied Sharpe ratios. This out‐of‐sample success comes from identifying predictors that are unexpected, short‐lived, and sparse. Although the LASSO uses a statistical rule rather than economic intuition to identify predictors, the predictors it identifies are nevertheless associated with economically meaningful events: the LASSO tends to identify as predictors stocks with news about fundamentals.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文使用LASSO回归对全截面滞后收益进行滚动一分钟预测，发现LASSO能提升样本外拟合度和夏普比率，其成功源于识别出意外、短暂且稀疏的预测变量，这些变量往往与基本面新闻相关。
ai_analysis.core_factors: LASSO正则化回归，利用滞后收益的整个横截面作为预测变量
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：股票；预测频率：每分钟；回顾期：滚动一分钟；投资组合：全横截面
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 样本外拟合度提升，夏普比率提高（具体数值未明确给出）

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Stock Return Predictability and Variance Risk Premia: Statistical Inference and International Evidence
excerpt_en: Abstract Recent empirical evidence suggests that the variance risk premium predicts aggregate stock market returns. We demonstrate that statistical finite sample biases cannot “explain” this apparent predictability. Further corroborating the existing evidence of the United States, we show that country-specific regressions for France, Germany, Japan, Switzerland, the Netherlands, Belgium, and the United Kingdom result in quite similar patterns. Defining a “global” variance risk premium, we uncover even stronger predictability and almost identical cross-country patterns through the use of panel regressions.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 该论文研究了方差风险溢价对股票市场回报的可预测性，通过统计推断和国际证据证实了这种预测关系，并发现全球方差风险溢价具有更强的预测能力。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 方差风险溢价 (Variance Risk Premium)
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别: 股票市场指数; 国家: 美国、法国、德国、日本、瑞士、荷兰、比利时、英国; 频率: 月度或季度（具体未明确）; 回看期: 未指定
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 论文报告了回归的统计显著性，但未提供具体的夏普比率、收益等回测数据。

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Stock price prediction using DEEP learning algorithm and its comparison with machine learning algorithms
excerpt_en: Summary Security indices are the main tools for evaluation of the status of financial markets. Moreover, a main part of the economy of any country is constituted of investment in stock markets. Therefore, investors could maximize the return of investment if it becomes possible to predict the future trend of stock market with appropriate methods. The nonlinearity and nonstationarity of financial series make their prediction complicated. This study seeks to evaluate the prediction power of machine‐learning models in a stock market. The data used in this study include the daily close price data of iShares MSCI United Kingdom exchange‐traded fund from January 2015 to June 2018. The prediction process is done through four models of machine‐learning algorithms. The results indicate that the deep learning method is better in prediction than the other methods, and the support vector regression method is in the next rank with respect to neural network and random forest methods with less error.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本研究比较了深度学习、支持向量回归、神经网络和随机森林等机器学习模型在股票价格预测中的表现，发现深度学习方法在预测准确性上优于其他模型，可用于辅助投资决策。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 时间序列预测，采用深度学习（如LSTM）及支持向量回归、神经网络、随机森林等机器学习模型
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: 资产类别：ETF（iShares MSCI United Kingdom）；数据频率：日频；时间范围：2015年1月至2018年6月；模型：深度学习、SVR、神经网络、随机森林
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: 未提供回测数据，仅提及深度学习方法预测误差较小

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] Investor Attention and Stock Returns
excerpt_en: Abstract We propose an investor attention index based on proxies in the literature and find that it predicts the stock market risk premium significantly, both in sample and out of sample, whereas every proxy individually has little predictive power. The index is extracted using partial least squares, but the results are similar by the scaled principal component analysis. Moreover, the index can deliver sizable economic gains for mean-variance investors in asset allocation. The predictive power of the investor attention index stems primarily from the reversal of temporary price pressure and from the stronger forecasting ability for high-variance stocks.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文提出基于多个投资者关注度代理变量（如搜索量、新闻数量等）的投资者关注度指数，采用偏最小二乘法或主成分分析法构建。该指数能够显著预测股票市场风险溢价，在样本内和样本外均有预测能力，并为均值-方差投资者带来可观的经济收益。
ai_analysis.core_factors: 复合投资者关注度指数（基于多个关注度代理变量，如搜索量、新闻数量等）
ai_analysis.replication_parameters: Not specified
ai_analysis.performance_metrics: No backtest data provided

title_en: [OpenAlex Closed] A comprehensive look at financial volatility prediction by economic variables
excerpt_en: SUMMARY We investigate whether return volatility is predictable by macroeconomic and financial variables to shed light on the economic drivers of financial volatility. Our approach is distinct owing to its comprehensiveness: First, we employ a data‐rich forecast methodology to handle a large set of potential predictors in a Bayesian model‐averaging approach and, second, we take a look at multiple asset classes (equities, foreign exchange, bonds and commodities) over long time spans. We find that proxies for credit risk and funding liquidity consistently show up as common predictors of volatility across asset classes. Variables capturing time‐varying risk premia also perform well as predictors of volatility. While forecasts by macro‐finance augmented models also achieve forecasting gains out‐of‐sample relative to autoregressive benchmarks, the performance varies across asset classes and over time. Copyright © 2012 John Wiley & Sons, Ltd.

ai_analysis.chinese_summary: 本文使用宏观经济和金融变量预测金融波动率，采用贝叶斯模型平均方法处理大量预测因子，发现信用风险和融资流动性是跨资产类别的常见波动率预测因子。该方法可用于波动率交易策略。
